---
title: "Amplitude _analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
# ============================================================
# STEP 1 — LOAD LIBRARIES
# ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# STEP 2 — READ MATCHED DATASET
# ============================================================

final_df <- read.csv("Path\\matched_final_clean.csv")

# confirm
nrow(final_df)
names(final_df)
table(final_df$Type)
table(final_df$stratum)
```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# STEP 3 — READ AMPLITUDE DATA
# ============================================================

amp <- read.csv("//pathAmplitude_NDVI_EVI_NDMI_grids_2016_2025_CSV.csv")

# fix id type
amp <- amp %>% mutate(id = as.numeric(id))
final_df <- final_df %>% mutate(id = as.numeric(id))

# join amplitude to matched dataset
final_df <- final_df %>%
  left_join(amp %>% select(-Type, -`area.ha.`, -system.index, -.geo),
            by = "id")

# confirm
dim(final_df)
names(final_df)[30:60]
```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# STEP 4 — DEFINE COLUMNS AND CHECK NAs
# ============================================================

evi_cols <- paste0("EVI_amp_", 2016:2025)
ndmi_cols <- paste0("NDMI_amp_", 2016:2025)
ndvi_cols <- paste0("NDVI_amp_", 2016:2025)

# check NAs
final_df %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(evi_cols), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "year", values_to = "n_missing")
```


```{r}

```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# STEP 5 — AMPLITUDE TREND PLOTS
# ============================================================

# use 2018-2025 dropping 2017
amp_cols <- paste0("EVI_amp_", 2019:2025)

# summarise by stratum
amp_strat_summary <- bind_rows(
  final_df %>%
    filter(Type == "Project") %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(amp_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "EVI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("EVI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Project"),
  
  final_df %>%
    filter(Type == "Control") %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(amp_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "EVI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("EVI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Control")
)

# trend labels
trend_labels_amp <- amp_strat_summary %>%
  group_by(stratum, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    rate = round(coef(lm(EVI_amp ~ Year))[2] * 1000, 1),
    y_end = predict(lm(EVI_amp ~ Year), newdata = data.frame(Year = 2025)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Type, ": ", rate))

# plot per stratum
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  p <- amp_strat_summary %>%
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = EVI_amp, color = Type, shape = Type)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text(data = trend_labels_amp %>% filter(stratum == s) %>%
                mutate(y_end = ifelse(Type == "Control", y_end + 0.005, y_end - 0.005)),
              aes(x = 2025.3, y = y_end, label = label),
              hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Project" = "#E04B2A", "Control" = "#2A7AE0")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Project" = 3, "Control" = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(2018, 2027), breaks = c(2018:2021, 2023:2025)) +
    labs(title = paste0("EVI Amplitude (2018-2025) — ", s, " canopy"),
         subtitle = "Lower amplitude = less dry season biomass = less fuel",
         x = "Year", y = "Mean EVI Amplitude",
         caption = "Points = observed annual means · Lines = modelled trend") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  print(p)
}
```
```{r}
table(is.na(final_df$EVI_amp_2022))
```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# STEP 5B — AMPLITUDE TRENDS RESPECTING MATCHING
# ============================================================

# weighted control mean per project grid
ctrl_amp_weighted <- final_df %>%
  filter(Type == "Control") %>%
  group_by(projCtr_ID, stratum) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(amp_cols),
                   \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

# project amplitude
proj_amp <- final_df %>%
  filter(Type == "Project") %>%
  select(projCtr_ID = id, stratum, all_of(amp_cols)) %>%
  mutate(projCtr_ID = as.character(projCtr_ID))

# summarise by year and stratum
amp_strat_summary <- bind_rows(
  proj_amp %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(amp_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "EVI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("EVI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Project"),
  
  ctrl_amp_weighted %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(amp_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "EVI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("EVI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Control")
)

# trend labels
trend_labels_amp <- amp_strat_summary %>%
  group_by(stratum, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    rate = round(coef(lm(EVI_amp ~ Year))[2] * 1000, 1),
    y_end = predict(lm(EVI_amp ~ Year), newdata = data.frame(Year = 2025)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Type, ": ", rate))

# plot per stratum
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  p <- amp_strat_summary %>%
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = EVI_amp, color = Type, shape = Type)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text(data = trend_labels_amp %>% filter(stratum == s) %>%
                mutate(y_end = ifelse(Type == "Control", y_end + 0.005, y_end - 0.005)),
              aes(x = 2025.3, y = y_end, label = label),
              hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Project" = "#E04B2A", "Control" = "#2A7AE0")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Project" = 3, "Control" = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(2018, 2027), breaks = 2018:2025) +
    labs(title = paste0("EVI Amplitude (2018-2025) — ", s, " canopy"),
         subtitle = "Lower amplitude = less dry season biomass = less fuel",
         x = "Year", y = "Mean EVI Amplitude",
         caption = "Points = observed annual means · Lines = modelled trend") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  print(p)
}
```
```{r}
# simple amplitude trend - just points and connecting lines
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  p <- amp_strat_summary %>%
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = EVI_amp, color = Type, shape = Type)) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Project" = "#E04B2A", "Control" = "#2A7AE0")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Project" = 3, "Control" = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2019:2025) +
    labs(title = paste0("EVI Amplitude trend — ", s, " canopy"),
         #subtitle = "Is dry season fuel load changing over time?",
         x = "Year", y = "Mean EVI Amplitude") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  print(p)
}
```

```{r}
# check each stratum separately
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  cat("\n--- Stratum:", s, "---\n")
  d <- amp_model_data %>% filter(stratum == s)
  cat("Project grids:", n_distinct(d$id[d$treatment == 1]), "\n")
  cat("Control grids:", n_distinct(d$id[d$treatment == 0]), "\n")
  cat("Years:", unique(d$year), "\n")
  cat("NAs in EVI_amp:", sum(is.na(d$EVI_amp)), "\n")
}
```
```{r}
# fix weights type
amp_model_data <- amp_model_data %>%
  mutate(weights = as.numeric(weights))

# check
class(amp_model_data$weights)
summary(amp_model_data$weights)
```

```{r}
results <- lapply(strata, function(s) {
  d <- amp_model_data %>% 
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    left_join(final_df %>% select(id, subclass_unique), by = "id")
  
  m <- lmer(EVI_amp ~ treatment * year + (1 | subclass_unique),
            data = d, weights = weights)
  
  coefs <- summary(m)$coefficients
  ci <- confint(m, parm = "treatment:year", method = "Wald")
  
  data.frame(
    stratum = s,
    ctrl_trend = round(coefs["year", "Estimate"], 5),
    proj_trend = round(coefs["year", "Estimate"] + 
                       coefs["treatment:year", "Estimate"], 5),
    divergence = round(coefs["treatment:year", "Estimate"], 5),
    ci_low = round(ci[1], 5),
    ci_high = round(ci[2], 5),
    t_value = round(coefs["treatment:year", "t value"], 1),
    p_value = coefs["treatment:year", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results)
results_df
```

```{r}
results_df %>%
  mutate(
    ctrl_trend = paste0("+", round(ctrl_trend*1000, 2), "×10⁻³/yr"),
    proj_trend = paste0(round(proj_trend*1000, 2), "×10⁻³/yr"),
    divergence = paste0(round(divergence*1000, 2), "×10⁻³/yr"),
    ci = paste0("[", round(ci_low*1000, 2), ", ", round(ci_high*1000, 2), "]"),
    p_value = "<0.001"
  ) %>%
  select(stratum, ctrl_trend, proj_trend, divergence, ci, t_value, p_value)
```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# NDVI AMPLITUDE - TRENDS AND MODEL
# ============================================================

ndvi_cols <- paste0("NDVI_amp_", 2019:2025)

# summarise by stratum respecting matching
ctrl_ndvi_weighted <- final_df %>%
  filter(Type == "Control") %>%
  group_by(projCtr_ID, stratum) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(ndvi_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

proj_ndvi <- final_df %>%
  filter(Type == "Project") %>%
  select(projCtr_ID = id, stratum, all_of(ndvi_cols)) %>%
  mutate(projCtr_ID = as.character(projCtr_ID))

# summarise by year and stratum
ndvi_strat_summary <- bind_rows(
  proj_ndvi %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(ndvi_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "NDVI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("NDVI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Project"),
  
  ctrl_ndvi_weighted %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(ndvi_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "NDVI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("NDVI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Control")
)

# trend labels
trend_labels_ndvi <- ndvi_strat_summary %>%
  group_by(stratum, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    rate = round(coef(lm(NDVI_amp ~ Year))[2] * 1000, 1),
    y_end = predict(lm(NDVI_amp ~ Year), newdata = data.frame(Year = 2025)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Type, ": ", rate))

# plot per stratum
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  p <- ndvi_strat_summary %>%
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = NDVI_amp, color = Type, shape = Type)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text(data = trend_labels_ndvi %>% filter(stratum == s) %>%
                mutate(y_end = ifelse(Type == "Control", y_end + 0.005, y_end - 0.005)),
              aes(x = 2025.3, y = y_end, label = label),
              hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Project" = "#E04B2A", "Control" = "#2A7AE0")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Project" = 3, "Control" = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(2019, 2027), breaks = 2019:2025) +
    labs(title = paste0("NDVI Amplitude (2019-2025) — ", s, " canopy"),
         subtitle = "Lower amplitude = less dry season biomass = less fuel",
         x = "Year", y = "Mean NDVI Amplitude",
         caption = "Points = observed annual means · Lines = modelled trend") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  print(p)
}
```
```{r}
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  p <- ndvi_strat_summary %>%
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = NDVI_amp, color = Type, shape = Type)) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Project" = "#E04B2A", "Control" = "#2A7AE0")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Project" = 3, "Control" = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2019:2025) +
    labs(title = paste0("NDVI Amplitude trend — ", s, " canopy"),
         subtitle = "Is dry season fuel load changing over time?",
         x = "Year", y = "Mean NDVI Amplitude") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  print(p)
}
```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# NDVI AMPLITUDE MODEL BY STRATUM
# ============================================================

ndvi_model_data <- final_df %>%
  select(id, Type, subclass_unique, weights, stratum,
         all_of(ndvi_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("NDVI_amp_"),
               names_to = "year",
               values_to = "NDVI_amp") %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(gsub("NDVI_amp_", "", year)),
    treatment = ifelse(Type == "Project", 1, 0),
    weights = as.numeric(weights)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(NDVI_amp))

# run model per stratum
ndvi_results <- lapply(strata, function(s) {
  d <- ndvi_model_data %>% filter(stratum == s)
  m <- lmer(NDVI_amp ~ treatment * year + (1 | subclass_unique),
            data = d, weights = weights)
  
  coefs <- summary(m)$coefficients
  ci <- confint(m, parm = "treatment:year", method = "Wald")
  
  data.frame(
    stratum = s,
    ctrl_trend = round(coefs["year", "Estimate"], 5),
    proj_trend = round(coefs["year", "Estimate"] + 
                       coefs["treatment:year", "Estimate"], 5),
    divergence = round(coefs["treatment:year", "Estimate"], 5),
    ci_low = round(ci[1], 5),
    ci_high = round(ci[2], 5),
    t_value = round(coefs["treatment:year", "t value"], 1),
    p_value = coefs["treatment:year", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
})

ndvi_results_df <- bind_rows(ndvi_results)
ndvi_results_df
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# NDMI AMPLITUDE - TRENDS AND MODEL
# ============================================================

ndmi_cols <- paste0("NDMI_amp_", 2019:2025)

# summarise by stratum respecting matching
ctrl_ndmi_weighted <- final_df %>%
  filter(Type == "Control") %>%
  group_by(projCtr_ID, stratum) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(ndmi_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

proj_ndmi <- final_df %>%
  filter(Type == "Project") %>%
  select(projCtr_ID = id, stratum, all_of(ndmi_cols)) %>%
  mutate(projCtr_ID = as.character(projCtr_ID))

# summarise by year and stratum
ndmi_strat_summary <- bind_rows(
  proj_ndmi %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(ndmi_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "NDMI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("NDMI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Project"),
  
  ctrl_ndmi_weighted %>%
    group_by(stratum) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(ndmi_cols), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    pivot_longer(-stratum, names_to = "Year", values_to = "NDMI_amp") %>%
    mutate(Year = as.numeric(gsub("NDMI_amp_", "", Year)), Type = "Control")
)

# trend labels
trend_labels_ndmi <- ndmi_strat_summary %>%
  group_by(stratum, Type) %>%
  summarise(
    rate = round(coef(lm(NDMI_amp ~ Year))[2] * 1000, 1),
    y_end = predict(lm(NDMI_amp ~ Year), newdata = data.frame(Year = 2025)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Type, ": ", rate))

# trend plots
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  p <- ndmi_strat_summary %>%
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = NDMI_amp, color = Type, shape = Type)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_text(data = trend_labels_ndmi %>% filter(stratum == s) %>%
                mutate(y_end = ifelse(Type == "Control", y_end + 0.005, y_end - 0.005)),
              aes(x = 2025.3, y = y_end, label = label),
              hjust = 0, size = 3.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Project" = "#E04B2A", "Control" = "#2A7AE0")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Project" = 3, "Control" = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(2019, 2027), breaks = 2019:2025) +
    labs(title = paste0("NDMI Amplitude (2019-2025) — ", s, " canopy"),
         subtitle = "Lower amplitude = less dry season moisture loss = less fuel",
         x = "Year", y = "Mean NDMI Amplitude",
         caption = "Points = observed annual means · Lines = modelled trend") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  print(p)
}

# simple line plots
for (s in c("Open", "Moderate", "Dense")) {
  p <- ndmi_strat_summary %>%
    filter(stratum == s) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = NDMI_amp, color = Type, shape = Type)) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Project" = "#E04B2A", "Control" = "#2A7AE0")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Project" = 3, "Control" = 1)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2019:2025) +
    labs(title = paste0("NDMI Amplitude trend — ", s, " canopy"),
         subtitle = "Is dry season moisture loss changing over time?",
         x = "Year", y = "Mean NDMI Amplitude") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  
  print(p)
}

# model
ndmi_model_data <- final_df %>%
  select(id, Type, subclass_unique, weights, stratum,
         all_of(ndmi_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("NDMI_amp_"),
               names_to = "year",
               values_to = "NDMI_amp") %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(gsub("NDMI_amp_", "", year)),
    treatment = ifelse(Type == "Project", 1, 0),
    weights = as.numeric(weights)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(NDMI_amp))

ndmi_results <- lapply(strata, function(s) {
  d <- ndmi_model_data %>% filter(stratum == s)
  m <- lmer(NDMI_amp ~ treatment * year + (1 | subclass_unique),
            data = d, weights = weights)
  
  coefs <- summary(m)$coefficients
  ci <- confint(m, parm = "treatment:year", method = "Wald")
  
  data.frame(
    stratum = s,
    ctrl_trend = round(coefs["year", "Estimate"], 5),
    proj_trend = round(coefs["year", "Estimate"] + 
                       coefs["treatment:year", "Estimate"], 5),
    divergence = round(coefs["treatment:year", "Estimate"], 5),
    ci_low = round(ci[1], 5),
    ci_high = round(ci[2], 5),
    t_value = round(coefs["treatment:year", "t value"], 1),
    p_value = coefs["treatment:year", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
})

ndmi_results_df <- bind_rows(ndmi_results)
ndmi_results_df
```
